market_summary: Global markets rallied sharply on March 24, 2026, driven by cautious optimism over potential de-escalation of US-Iran geopolitical tensions. Indian benchmarks (Nifty50 and Sensex) experienced significant gains alongside Asian indices.
art_highlight: The Art Basel and UBS Global Art Market Report 2026 confirms a 4% recovery in global art sales to $59.6 billion for 2025. Growth is driven by public auction rebounds and high-end segments, with cautious optimism for 2026.
